questions.text: The hormone responsible for male characteristics is:
questions.explanation: Testosterone is the male sex hormone produced by testes. It controls male secondary sexual characteristics.

questions.text: Adolescence is the period of physical and mental development.
questions.explanation: Adolescence is the transitional period between childhood and adulthood involving physical, mental, and emotional changes.

questions.correctAnswer: The process of physical changes leading to sexual maturity.
questions.explanation: Puberty is the process during which adolescents develop secondary sexual characteristics and become capable of reproduction.
Estrogen is the primary female sex hormone produced by ovaries. It controls female secondary sexual characteristics.
